positive: A highly stylized, minimalist line art illustration of a crescent moon embracing a constellation of whimsical celestial bodies, including stylized shooting stars, planets, and simple zodiac symbols. The artwork should feature clean silhouettes and intricate single-weight lines, emphasizing strong contrast against a deep midnight blue and indigo background. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and scalable for fabric printing, using a limited palette of gold leaf accents and white ink for maximum pop. Perfect for t-shirt or hoodie print, high detail, graphic design, celestial theme, vaporwave influence, smooth vector illustration.
